summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of the Bilingual Tax Office CRM Portal. All core functionality is working correctly including backend APIs (100% pass rate), login flow, dashboard stats, brand settings with all tabs functional, booking page integration, and complete booking workflow. Application is fully functional with 48-hour reminder system and professional dark navy + gold design.
passed_tests: Backend API health check at /api/health
Admin login flow with admin@taxoffice.com / admin123
Dashboard stats display (5 clients, 3 active, 1 today appointment, 3 pending cases)
Brand Settings page with all tabs (Identity, Colors, Content, Contact, Domain)
Brand Settings Preview button opens booking page in new tab
Brand Settings Save button with confirmation dialog persists changes
Public booking page at /book loads correctly with 5 services
Services list loads properly on booking page
Forgot Password link present on login page
Complete booking workflow (service selection, date/time, contact info, confirmation)
Bilingual support (English/Spanish toggle working)
Dark navy + gold professional design theme
Backend: All 8 API endpoints tested (100% pass rate)
Backend: JWT authentication working
Backend: Dashboard stats API returning correct data
Backend: Services API returning active services
Backend: Brand settings GET/PUT operations
Backend: Available slots API working
Backend: Clients list API with demo data
Frontend: Login page with demo credentials displayed
Frontend: Dashboard with stats cards and recent activities
Frontend: Brand Settings Identity tab with logo upload
Frontend: Brand Settings Colors tab with preview
Frontend: Brand Settings Content tab with hero/footer text
Frontend: Brand Settings Contact tab with business info
Frontend: Brand Settings Domain tab with custom domain setup
Frontend: Booking page responsive design
Frontend: Multi-step booking form with validation
Frontend: Calendar date/time selection
Frontend: Booking confirmation with success message
Integration: Frontend-backend API communication
Integration: Brand settings changes reflect on booking page
Integration: Booking submission creates appointment successfully
